member.name: T:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationManager
member.summary: Renders notifications to the system console with colored output and progress bars.

member.name: M:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationManager.#ctor(Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration,Notification.Core.INotificationEventService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified configuration and event service.
member.param: The event service used to raise lifecycle events.

member.name: M:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationManager.Show(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest)
member.summary: Displays the specified notification in the console.
member.returns: The unique identifier of the displayed notification.

member.name: M:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationManager.Dismiss(System.Guid)
member.summary: Dismisses the notification with the specified identifier.
member.param: The identifier of the notification to dismiss.

member.name: M:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationManager.ShowProgress(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Renders an inline progress bar in the console.
member.param: The text displayed next to the progress bar.
The completion percentage in the range 0 to 100.

member.name: T:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering console notification services in an .

member.name: M:Notification.Console.ConsoleNotificationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddConsoleNotifications(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers the console notification manager and core notification services.
member.param: The service collection to add the services to.
An optional delegate to configure the notification settings.
member.returns: The same service collection instance for chaining.
